backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no functions or logic.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report listing feature rewrite tasks, affected files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-style text containing prewritten summaries for all frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS config defining color variables, dark mode settings, and base styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with routes for all energy pages inside a shared layout.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/Biofuel: React component rendering an SVG diagram of ethanol and biodiesel production pathways.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/Biomass: React component rendering an SVG diagram showing biomass combustion and electricity generation steps.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/Geother: Renders an SVG diagram illustrating geothermal energy extraction, wells, and power generation components.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/PVCellD: Displays an SVG showing how a photovoltaic cell converts sunlight into electricity, including layers and electron flow.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/WaterTu: Provides an SVG diagram of hydropower generation from reservoir water through a turbine to a generator.
frontend/src/components/diagrams/WindTur: Shows an SVG wind turbine diagram with blades, rotor, shafts, gearbox, and generator.
frontend/src/components/site/RouteTransi: Wraps page content in a fade‑in animation for route transitions.
Footer displaying site info, year, and a caffeine.ai link with attribution.
Defines the page layout with navigation at the top, main content, and footer.
frontend/src/components/site/SiteNav.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with desktop links and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, handling login, stored identity loading, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for future React Query hooks; currently unused.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom earth‑tone color variables, including light/dark themes and typography rules.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering.
frontend/src/pages/BiofuelsPage.tsx: Renders educational content explaining ethanol and biodiesel production with supporting sections and diagrams.
frontend/src/pages/BiomassEnergyPage.tsx: Displays detailed explanations of biomass energy sources and conversion processes, including a process diagram.
Presents an overview of geothermal energy, how underground heat is used, and includes a geothermal diagram.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Shows a homepage with interactive vertical image cards linking to various renewable‑energy topic pages.
frontend/src/pages/HydropowerTidalPage.t: Renders a page explaining how hydropower and tidal energy work, with sections on dams, turbines, and an included water turbine diagram.
frontend/src/pages/SolarEnergyPage.tsx: Renders a solar energy page covering passive and active solar heating plus photovoltaic cells, including a PV cell diagram.
frontend/src/pages/SourcesPage.tsx: Displays categorized lists of renewable‑energy educational resources using cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/WindEnergyPage.tsx: Renders a wind energy page explaining turbine mechanics and electricity generation, including a wind turbine diagram.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with custom colors, typography, animations, and plugin support.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, existing features, and tracked requirements for the renewable energy education app.
